name: Dr Zakaria Sawadogo
title: Lecturer & Researcher
headline: Artificial Intelligence • Cybersecurity • Data Science
bio: Dr Zakaria Sawadogo is a lecturer and researcher working at the intersection of artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, Android malware analysis, privacy-preserving systems, data science, and digital transformation. His work focuses on building reliable, useful, and locally relevant intelligent systems for education, public services, and secure digital ecosystems.
shortBio: Lecturer and researcher in AI, cybersecurity, data science, privacy, and digital transformation.
responsibilities: Academic program design and teaching coordination
Research supervision in AI and cybersecurity
Industry and public-sector digital transformation advisory
